scripts.dev:backend:clean: sh -c 'PORT_TO_FREE=${BACKEND_PORT:-4000}; PIDS=$(lsof -ti tcp:${PORT_TO_FREE}); if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; then echo "Stopping process(es) on :${PORT_TO_FREE} -> $PIDS"; echo "$PIDS" | xargs kill; fi; npm run dev:backend'
scripts.dev:frontend: sh -c 'FRONTEND_PORT=${FRONTEND_PORT:-5173} BACKEND_PORT=${BACKEND_PORT:-4000} npm run dev --workspace app/frontend'
scripts.dev:frontend:clean: sh -c 'PORT_TO_FREE=${FRONTEND_PORT:-5173}; PIDS=$(lsof -ti tcp:${PORT_TO_FREE}); if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; then echo "Stopping process(es) on :${PORT_TO_FREE} -> $PIDS"; echo "$PIDS" | xargs kill; fi; npm run dev:frontend'
scripts.dev:clean: sh -c 'BACKEND_PORT=${BACKEND_PORT:-4000}; FRONTEND_PORT=${FRONTEND_PORT:-5173}; PIDS_BACKEND=$(lsof -ti tcp:${BACKEND_PORT}); PIDS_FRONTEND=$(lsof -ti tcp:${FRONTEND_PORT}); if [ -n "$PIDS_BACKEND" ]; then echo "Stopping process(es) on :${BACKEND_PORT} -> $PIDS_BACKEND"; echo "$PIDS_BACKEND" | xargs kill; fi; if [ -n "$PIDS_FRONTEND" ]; then echo "Stopping process(es) on :${FRONTEND_PORT} -> $PIDS_FRONTEND"; echo "$PIDS_FRONTEND" | xargs kill; fi; npm run dev'
scripts.cypress:open: sh -c 'unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE; FRONTEND_PORT=${FRONTEND_PORT:-5173}; CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER=${CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER:-$HOME/Library/Caches/Cypress} CYPRESS_VERIFY_TIMEOUT=120000 CYPRESS_baseUrl=http://localhost:${FRONTEND_PORT} npx cypress open "$@"' --
scripts.cypress:run: sh -c 'unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE; FRONTEND_PORT=${FRONTEND_PORT:-5173}; CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER=${CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER:-$HOME/Library/Caches/Cypress} CYPRESS_VERIFY_TIMEOUT=120000 CYPRESS_baseUrl=http://localhost:${FRONTEND_PORT} npx cypress run "$@"' --
scripts.cypress:run:a11y: sh -c 'unset ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE; FRONTEND_PORT=${FRONTEND_PORT:-5173}; CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER=${CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER:-$HOME/Library/Caches/Cypress} CYPRESS_VERIFY_TIMEOUT=120000 CYPRESS_RUN_A11Y=true CYPRESS_baseUrl=http://localhost:${FRONTEND_PORT} npx cypress run --spec cypress/e2e/accessibility.cy.ts'
scripts.test:e2e: sh -c 'BACKEND_PORT=${BACKEND_PORT:-4000}; FRONTEND_PORT=${FRONTEND_PORT:-5173}; export BACKEND_PORT FRONTEND_PORT; start-server-and-test "npm run dev:backend" "http://localhost:${BACKEND_PORT}/health" "npm run dev:frontend" "http://localhost:${FRONTEND_PORT}" "npm run cypress:run:pdf"'
scripts.test:a11y: sh -c 'BACKEND_PORT=${BACKEND_PORT:-4000}; FRONTEND_PORT=${FRONTEND_PORT:-5173}; export BACKEND_PORT FRONTEND_PORT; start-server-and-test "npm run dev:backend" "http://localhost:${BACKEND_PORT}/health" "npm run dev:frontend" "http://localhost:${FRONTEND_PORT}" "npm run cypress:run:a11y"'
scripts.workflow:final-pass:jira: sh -c 'set -a; . ./requirements/.env.jira.local; set +a; if [ -z "$REQUIREMENTS_REVIEW_PATH" ] && [ -n "$JIRA_ISSUE_KEY" ]; then REQUIREMENTS_REVIEW_PATH="requirements/feature_${JIRA_ISSUE_KEY}.md"; fi; export REQUIREMENTS_REVIEW_PATH; npm run workflow:final-pass'
